spec_match.rationale: Properly shows the usage of ReportingObserver catching crashes and matching the new fields.

interactive.rationale: Features a live panel tracking window top-level state and focus, plus a simulated iframe and crash simulation button.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly matches the explanation of triage visibility states and top-level attributes.

edge_cases.rationale: Checks presence of ReportingObserver and gives browser-specific feedback.

references.rationale: Links the W3C Reporting API spec and ChromeStatus entry.

design_system.rationale: Complies with CSS and design rules using existing theme variables.

summary: Excellent basic interactive demonstration of the reporting observer and simulated iframe structure.
